study.study_name: Benaroya Research Institute Down Syndrome Registry
study.description: The Down syndrome registry at Benaroya Research Institute (BRI) builds on institutional expertise to collect and analyze longitudinal biological samples and concomitant clinical metadata across the lifespan of people with Down syndrome. The goal is to help advance therapeutic approaches to predict, prevent and cure co-occurring conditions of Down syndrome.
